title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd:
ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd!
